resonance_events.excerpt: Arunachala is the definitive, transformative monolith.

resonance_events.excerpt: The black stone is the stone of transformation... The Philosopher's Stone.

resonance_events.excerpt: The body -- container of man's spirit for millions of years, is cast aside forever.
